What We Do

Full-Service
Roofing

From a single missing shingle to a complete tear-off and re-roof — we handle residential and commercial projects throughout the Sacramento Valley.

🏠

Roof Replacement

Full tear-off and re-roof using manufacturer-certified materials. We handle permits, haul off the old roof, and leave your property clean.

🔧

Roof Repair

Leaks, missing shingles, flashing failures, and ponding water. We diagnose accurately and fix it right the first time — no upselling.

⚡

Storm Damage

Emergency tarping available 24/7. We document damage for insurance claims and work directly with adjusters to get you the full benefit you're owed.

🆕

New Construction

Working with builders and general contractors throughout Sacramento. Tight scheduling, clean staging, and inspection-ready workmanship.

🌊

Gutters & Drainage

Seamless gutter installation, cleaning, and repairs. Proper drainage extends your roof's life and protects your foundation.

🔍

Inspections

Pre-sale, post-storm, and annual maintenance inspections with a written report. Know exactly what you're dealing with before it becomes an emergency.

Roof Emergency? We're Available Now.

Tarps deployed within hours. Storm damage documented for your insurance claim.

Call Emergency Line
Why Summit Roofing

We Don't Cut Corners on Your Roof

  • ✓
    All Work Warranted 10-year workmanship warranty on full replacements. Manufacturer material warranties up to 50 years depending on product.
  • ✓
    Insurance Claim Experts We've helped hundreds of Sacramento homeowners navigate storm claims. We know what documentation adjusters need and we provide it.
  • ✓
    No-Surprise Pricing Written estimate before a single nail is driven. The price we quote is the price you pay unless you approve a scope change in writing.
  • ✓
    Crew, Not Subs Our own trained employees show up — not a rotation of unknown subcontractors. Consistent quality job to job.
★★★★★

"Summit replaced our roof after the October storm. They had the tarp up same day, managed the entire insurance claim, and finished the job in two days. Couldn't recommend them more."

— Maria T., Elk Grove
— James K., Roseville "Showed up on time, gave a fair price, no drama. Will call them again."
— Susan M., Rancho Cordova "Fixed a leak three other roofers couldn't find. Honest assessment, fair price."
How It Works

From Call to Complete

I

Free Estimate

We come out, inspect your roof, and give you a written quote. No pressure, no sales tactics.

II

Scope & Schedule

We agree on materials, timing, and price. For insurance jobs, we handle all documentation.

III

Installation

Our crew arrives on the scheduled date. We protect your property, work clean, and stay on schedule.

IV

Final Walkthrough

We walk the job with you, confirm you're satisfied, and hand over your warranty paperwork.

Materials We Work With

The Right Material
for Every Roof

🏗️

Asphalt Shingles

Owens Corning, GAF, and CertainTeed — 3-tab and architectural.

🔶

Metal Roofing

Standing seam, corrugated, and metal shake. Lasts 50+ years.

🪨

Tile & Concrete

Spanish, flat, and S-tile for Sacramento's classic homes.

⬛

Flat / TPO

TPO, modified bitumen, and torch-down for low-slope commercial roofs.

🌲

Cedar Shake

Fire-treated and natural cedar for premium residential applications.
